fields.description: Role-shaped, resolved per project at notification time: Account Executive = owner of the source Opportunity; Project Manager = the project's Project Manager field; Accounts Receivable = the rep named in ERPNext Enhancements Settings.
fields.label: Responsible Role
fields.options:
Account Executive
Accounts Receivable
Project Manager

fields.description: Completes automatically from this system event. Leave blank for steps confirmed manually on the Project.
fields.label: Auto-Complete Anchor
fields.options:
Opportunity Won
Project Created
Payment Received

fields.description: Hours after this step becomes the current step before daily escalation reminders fire. 0 disables escalation for this step.
fields.label: SLA (Hours)

fields.description: Shown to the responsible person — what done looks like for this step.
fields.label: Description

fields.description: The source process definition this step encodes (e.g. PRO-0204), so the system and the official document can't drift silently.
fields.label: Process Document
